content_body:
Cabin relaxation + River adventures + horseback riding + zipline tour + lack of cellphone use = great vacation!! 

We had an amazing vacation here in Blue Ridge! We traveled 9 1/2 hours from SW Florida and had so much fun here. Lots of relaxing and making great memories. Zip-lining, tubing the river, and walking the train tracks/night hiking. Such good times! We made family dinners and just truly enjoyed our time. We will be back!! ~ The Alvarez Familia
title: Such Good Times!
